input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing failure is caused by tests referencing org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps APIs that existed in 1.1.5 but are absent from the 2.0.0-M1 actor jar; adding setup will not restore those removed APIs.
Do not add pekko-actor-typed as setup just to satisfy TypedActor-style tests: it is a separate module with the modern typed API and would shift coverage away from the target pekko-actor artifact.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required for meaningful coverage of org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; the artifact resolves with only scala-library and typesafe-config, and normal usage is in-process ActorSystem/Props/config APIs.
